description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Code Scan: CppCheck that runs on push to devel and release branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write for security events. The job checks out the repository, installs CppCheck and the SARIF tool, generates and builds the project, runs CppCheck, converts results to SARIF and Markdown, uploads the SARIF file to GitHub Code Scanning Alerts, archives static analysis artifacts, and fails if CppCheck reports errors.
